title: How Millennials Built Online Subculture & Gen Z Turned It Into the Feed
summary: The generational discourse between Millennials and Gen Z gets flattened into surface-level cultural jokes, but underneath that sits something worth actually examining, a genuine divergence in how two generations experienced culture online and what that did to the way subculture forms, spreads, and eventually means something to the people inside it.
